title: T-059 — Users screen (SET-008) — KPI tiles, table/cards, role pills filter (S-PU6)
prompt:
# T-059 — Users screen (SET-008) — KPI tiles, table/cards, role pills filter (S-PU6)

## Goal
SET-008 users_screen production component (prototype-parity).

Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/access-screens.jsx:4-151. Translation notes (canonical from prototype-index-settings.json): see `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-settings.md` and the entry's `translation_notes` array. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only (no @radix-ui/react-dialog import outside packages/ui per §0). Parity checklist (verify item-by-item before GREEN):
1. Section/region count + order matches prototype.
2. Field labels + types match prototype.
3. shadcn/Radix primitives match (Input, Select, Switch, Dialog etc).
4. Action buttons present in same order with same enable/disable rules.
5. Loading/empty/error states render per prototype.
6. Modal triggers open the correct modal id (SM-NN).
7. Keyboard focus order matches prototype.
8. assertModalA11y() passes for any modals invoked.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/users/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/users/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production page renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/access-screens.jsx:4-151` (users_screen), then it has structural parity (the same form sections, same field labels, same shadcn primitives, same modals invoked from same triggers), visual parity (same shadcn/Radix primitives — no drift to plain HTML, same density tokens), and interaction parity (same enable/disable rules, same loading/empty/error states, same keyboard focus order) — verified by an RTL snapshot test plus the parity checklist embedded in `pipeline_inputs.details`.
- Given org has seat_limit=50 and 17 active users, when KPI tile renders, then 'Seats used 17 / 50' is shown — value sourced from server query, not hardcoded.
- Given URL is /settings/users?view=cards&role=manager, when page renders, then card view is active and only Manager-category users (npd_manager/module_admin/planner/production_lead/quality_lead) are listed.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/users/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
